title: Rules for panel physicians :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Rules for panel physicians
Panel physician instructions outline the requirements for immigration medical examinations.
We inform panel physicians of our expectations through the New Zealand Immigration Panel Member Instructions. These  outline requirements for immigration medical examinations, as well as for membership of the onshore and offshore panel physician networks.

## INZ eMedical changes
In April 2021 updates were made to some questions in Immigration New Zealand eMedical examinations.
